Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is present. Represented by Raven Dunn.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Terrence Moser is present.
Attorney Katie Danielson representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of APR-23-2012 is vacated.
